title: Secure access to the Claude Platform with Workload Identity Federation
preview: Workload Identity Federation (WIF) is now generally available on the Claude Platform. WIF is compatible with any OIDC-compliant identity provider and covers all Claude API endpoints, including when accessing the endpoints through our first-party SDKs and Claude Code.

blocks.english: Workload Identity Federation (WIF) is now generally available on the Claude Platform. WIF is compatible with any OIDC-compliant identity provider and covers all Claude API endpoints, including when accessing the endpoints through our first-party SDKs and Claude Code.
blocks.chinese: Workload Identity Federation (WIF) 现已在 Claude 平台上正式发布（Generally Available）。WIF 兼容任何符合 OIDC 标准的身份提供者（identity provider），并覆盖所有 Claude API 端点，包括通过官方 SDK 和 Claude Code 访问端点的场景。

blocks.english: With WIF for workloads and `ant auth login` for interactive sessions, developers never have to handle a static API key when building with the Claude Platform.
blocks.chinese: 借助面向工作负载的 WIF 和面向交互式会话的 `ant auth login`，开发者在使用 Claude 平台构建应用时，再也不需要处理静态 API 密钥。
Workload Identity Federation 的工作原理

blocks.english: WIF replaces static API keys with short-lived, scoped credentials issued at request time. Whether you're a two-person startup running GitHub Actions or an enterprise with detailed credential policies, you can now authenticate with the Claude Platform the same way you authenticate with the rest of your stack.
blocks.chinese: WIF 用请求时签发的短期、限定范围的凭据（short-lived, scoped credentials）取代了静态 API 密钥。无论你是运行 GitHub Actions 的两人创业团队，还是拥有详细凭据策略的大型企业，你现在都可以用与技术栈其余部分相同的方式对 Claude 平台进行身份验证。

blocks.english: With WIF, there are no static Anthropic credentials to create, rotate, or leak. Workloads authenticate with the identity they already have: an AWS IAM role, a GCP or Kubernetes service account, an Azure managed identity, a GitHub Actions token, Okta, or other OIDC-compliant providers.
blocks.chinese: 使用 WIF，不再需要创建、轮换或担心泄露静态 Anthropic 凭据。工作负载使用其已有的身份进行验证：AWS IAM 角色、GCP 或 Kubernetes 服务账户、Azure 托管身份（managed identity）、GitHub Actions 令牌、Okta 或其他符合 OIDC 标准的提供者。

blocks.english: We're also introducing service accounts to the Claude Platform, so each workload can have its own identity, roles, and audit trail instead of a shared API key. First, a federation rule binds an external identity to a service account. Then, when a workload requests access, the Claude Platform verifies the workload's signed OIDC token, matches its claims against your federation rules, and issues a short-lived access token bounded by the service account's roles. Every exchange and request is recorded against that service account in your audit logs.
blocks.chinese: 我们还在 Claude 平台引入了服务账户（service accounts），这样每个工作负载都可以拥有自己的身份、角色和审计追踪，而不是共享一个 API 密钥。首先，一条联合规则（federation rule）将外部身份绑定到一个服务账户。然后，当工作负载请求访问时，Claude 平台会验证工作负载签名的 OIDC 令牌（token），将其声明（claims）与联合规则进行匹配，并签发一个受服务账户角色限制的短期访问令牌。每一次交换和请求都会在审计日志中记录到对应的服务账户下。

blocks.english: Set up your first workload in minutes
blocks.chinese: 几分钟内设置你的第一个工作负载

blocks.english: The [Claude Console](https://console.anthropic.com/) has a guided setup flow for configuring workload identities. The setup validates each step and finishes with a test command that confirms your workload can authenticate.
blocks.chinese: [Claude Console](https://console.anthropic.com/) 提供了引导式设置流程来配置工作负载身份。设置过程会验证每个步骤，并以一条测试命令结束，确认你的工作负载能够成功进行身份验证。

blocks.english: Run your whole organization without static keys
blocks.chinese: 无需静态密钥即可运行整个组织

blocks.english: WIF is compatible with the [Admin API](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/admin-api) for organization management. Federation rules can be configured for least-privilege access through fine-grained scopes.
blocks.chinese: WIF 兼容用于组织管理的 [Admin API](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/admin-api)。联合规则可以通过细粒度的作用域（scopes）配置最小权限访问（least-privilege access）。

blocks.english: Federation configuration is also fully programmatic for organizations operating at scale. New Admin API endpoints let you create and update issuers, service accounts, and federation rules.
blocks.chinese: 对于大规模运营的组织，联合配置也完全支持编程化操作。新增的 Admin API 端点允许你创建和更新签发者（issuers）、服务账户和联合规则。

blocks.english: API keys work alongside WIF, so you can migrate one workload at a time. Read the setup [guides](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/workload-identity-federation) for each identity provider, or open the [Claude Console](https://console.anthropic.com/) to connect your first workload.
blocks.chinese: API 密钥与 WIF 可以并行使用，因此你可以逐个工作负载地进行迁移。阅读各身份提供者的设置[指南](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/workload-identity-federation)，或打开 [Claude Console](https://console.anthropic.com/) 连接你的第一个工作负载。
